EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITimeZoneRule

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that control the Time Zone Rule.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("2CBFDCB1-C991-4F68-B5B1-919B1B1E6A25")]
public interface ITimeZoneRule

Properties

BiasFromUTC

The time zone bias from UTC in minutes. LocalTime = UtcTime + BiasFromUTC.

int BiasFromUTC { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

DaylightTimeBias

The bias to be used during daylight time. This bias is relative to the time zone's BiasFromUTC.

int DaylightTimeBias { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

DaylightTimeTransitionTime

Date for transition to daylight time.

TimeZoneTransitionTime DaylightTimeTransitionTime { get; set; }

Property Value

TimeZoneTransitionTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

StandardTimeBias

The bias to be used during Standard time. This bias is relative to the time zone's BiasFromUTC.

int StandardTimeBias { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

StandardTimeTransitionTime

Date for transition to standard time.

TimeZoneTransitionTime StandardTimeTransitionTime { get; set; }

Property Value

TimeZoneTransitionTime

Examples

Sample Snippet

Year

The year this rule is in effect.

int Year { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet
